LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT KLAMATH-TRINITY JOINT UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE OF ACTION TO HUMBOLDT COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO HUMBOLDT COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT. PLAINTIFF BCA ARCHITECTS, INC. IS REQUIRED TO PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS. ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KLAMATH-TRINITY JOINT UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE OF ACTION TO HUMBOLDT COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT.

Defendant and Cross-complainant Klamath-Trinity Joint Unified School District's motion for change of venue is granted. No opposition filed. The case is transferred to Humboldt County Superior Court. Plaintiff BCA Architects, Inc. is required to pay all transfer costs.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)
